docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2013 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,765.00 FILED BY SUNG, SEME AS TO DEFENDANT PICKSTAFF, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.00) SERVED MAY-29-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PICKSTAFF, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-26-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-26-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUNG, SEME RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PICKSTAFF, LLC $5,640.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,760.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR SUNG, SEME ASSIGNED TO QUAN, HENDSON
